Tests if the reciprocal of Math.sin(+0) equals Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.sin` function in JavaScript when given a positive zero as input. The assertion verifies that dividing 1 by the result of `Math.sin(+0)` yields `Infinity`. This test ensures that the mathematical operation and the handling of positive zero in the `Math.sin` function conform to expected behavior in JavaScript. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical edge case.
